impact: Advances the PP&D DevHub automation guardrails by proving agents may produce a non-official purchase review preview while refusing official purchase, certification, payment, cancellation, and inspection scheduling unless the current session confirms the exact action.
summary: Add fixture-backed DevHub guardrail coverage for online trade permit purchase review preview and exact session-specific confirmation gates.
target_task: Task checkbox-126: Add DevHub guardrail tests proving online trade permit purchase review can produce a preview but cannot perform official purchase, certification, payment, cancellation, or inspection scheduling without exact session-specific user confirmation.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
